title: Add predict_proba to remaining classifiers (RF, GB, HGB, AdaBoost, Bagging, Voting)
description:
predict_proba is present on FittedDecisionTreeClassifier, FittedExtraTreeClassifier, FittedExtraTreesClassifier — but MISSING on FittedRandomForestClassifier, FittedGradientBoostingClassifier, FittedHistGradientBoostingClassifier, FittedAdaBoostClassifier, FittedBaggingClassifier, FittedVotingClassifier (the latter only when voting='soft').

Implementation per estimator:
- RF / Extra (already done) / Bagging: average per-tree predict_proba
- GB / HGB: softmax of raw scores
- AdaBoost: weighted sum of base predict_proba (SAMME.R) or one-hot of predictions (SAMME)
- Voting: weighted average of base predict_proba
